procedure: Combine the sugar and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
Add saffron to the solution and cook it till it forms a syrup of three-thread consistency.
Melt the ghee, and mix this into the syrup.
Add cashew nut powder and mix it thoroughly.
Knead the mixture well, and roll it into a rectangle 0.5 cm "Cookbook:Centimetre (cm)") thick.
Lay the silver foil over the rectangle. Cut it into diamond shapes of approximately 1.5-inch length.
